{{Quote|It is sacred knowledge! It can only be passed on to the next in line for our Council of Elders! I-I'm sorry!|Tromak|<ref name="HRA 3" />}}
The '''Council of Elders''' was a [[Religion|religious]] institution of the [[Elders of the Path]] faith. Members of the council, such as [[Tromak]], held the title of Elder. The council possessed sacred knowledge which was forbidden to be revealed to outsiders, such as the locations of the two pieces of an [[Nameless control rods|ancient relic]] the Elders of the Path had hidden away long ago.<ref name="HRA 3" />

{{Deity-stub}}
